pages.text: $(l)Circle Pattern Augmentation$()$(br2)Modpack authors can append extra block requirements to any existing Circle tier without recompiling the mod. Drop a JSON in $(l)data/<your_pack>/circle_patterns/<id>.json$().

$(l)Additive only.$() These entries become $(l)additional$() requirements — existing Java defaults are preserved. Be aware: enabling new requirements at a tier players already built will invalidate their circles until they add the new blocks.
